column2: Directors who, at some point, I’ve considered a favorite
column5: Represented by my favorite movie from each.

Memoria is a movie that broadened my horizons to the capabilities of movies, and is one of my all time favorites for that reason. Having further explored Apichatpong, his style is comparable to walking through an art exhibition and experiencing the world through a museum-esque lens. His movies are as powerful as stumbling upon a piece of art that really moves you.
